question.label: Impact visible
question.name: When your impact isn't visible, where does that break down most?
question.description: Drills into the specific visibility gap she just named before moving on.

answer: Feedback on communication landed, and I am still processing it.

assessment.note: She names communication feedback that 'landed' but is still being processed, which signals a mild hit to confidence/energy and some uncertainty about how her impact is coming across.

new_queue.label: Communication feedback
new_queue.name: That communication feedback — what part of it are you still processing?

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Support shape
new_queue.name: What kind of support from me would actually change your week?

new_queue.label: Steadier finish
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks steadier for you?

issues: coverage: injected wellbeing into next question (0 touches after turn 5)

history.answer_excerpt: Feedback on communication landed, and I am still processing it.
The push worked, but I do not want that pace to become normal.
I am less overloaded now, but my calendar is still fragmented.
A lot of energy went into firefighting and context switching.
I can ship quickly, but I do not always feel the impact is visible.
